#  [Apache Flink 1.7.1 Released](</2018/12/21/apache-flink-1.7.1-released/>)

December 21, 2018 -

The Apache Flink community released the first bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.7 series.

This release includes 27 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.7.0. The list below includes a detailed list of all fixes.

We highly recommend all users to upgrade to Flink 1.7.1.

Updated Maven dependencies:


    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-java</artifactId>
      <version>1.7.1</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-streaming-java_2.11</artifactId>
      <version>1.7.1</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-clients_2.11</artifactId>
      <version>1.7.1</version>
    </dependency>


You can find the binaries on the updated [Downloads page](<http://flink.apache.org/downloads.html>).

List of resolved issues:

##  Sub-task

  * [[FLINK-10252](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-10252>)] - Handle oversized metric messages
  * [[FLINK-10367](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-10367>)] - Avoid recursion stack overflow during releasing SingleInputGate
  * [[FLINK-10522](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-10522>)] - Check if RecoverableWriter supportsResume and act accordingly.
  * [[FLINK-10963](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-10963>)] - Cleanup small objects uploaded to S3 as independent objects

##  Bug

  * [[FLINK-8336](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-8336>)] - YarnFileStageTestS3ITCase.testRecursiveUploadForYarnS3 test instability
  * [[FLINK-9646](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-9646>)] - ExecutionGraphCoLocationRestartTest.testConstraintsAfterRestart failed on Travis
  * [[FLINK-10149](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-10149>)] - Fink Mesos allocates extra port when not configured to do so.
  * [[FLINK-10359](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-10359>)] - Scala example in DataSet docs is broken
  * [[FLINK-10482](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-10482>)] - java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Negative number of in progress checkpoints
  * [[FLINK-10566](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-10566>)] - Flink Planning is exponential in the number of stages
  * [[FLINK-10997](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-10997>)] - Avro-confluent-registry does not bundle any dependency
  * [[FLINK-11011](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11011>)] - Elasticsearch 6 sink end-to-end test unstable
  * [[FLINK-11013](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11013>)] - Fix distinct aggregates for group window in Table API
  * [[FLINK-11017](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11017>)] - Time interval for window aggregations in SQL is wrongly translated if specified with YEAR_MONTH resolution
  * [[FLINK-11029](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11029>)] - Incorrect parameter in Working with state doc
  * [[FLINK-11032](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11032>)] - Elasticsearch (v6.3.1) sink end-to-end test unstable on Travis
  * [[FLINK-11033](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11033>)] - Elasticsearch (v6.3.1) sink end-to-end test unstable on Travis
  * [[FLINK-11041](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11041>)] - ReinterpretDataStreamAsKeyedStreamITCase.testReinterpretAsKeyedStream failed on Travis
  * [[FLINK-11044](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11044>)] - RegisterTableSink docs incorrect
  * [[FLINK-11045](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11045>)] - UserCodeClassLoader has not been set correctly for RuntimeUDFContext in CollectionExecutor
  * [[FLINK-11047](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11047>)] - CoGroupGroupSortTranslationTest does not compile with scala 2.12
  * [[FLINK-11085](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11085>)] - NoClassDefFoundError in presto-s3 filesystem
  * [[FLINK-11087](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11087>)] - Broadcast state migration Incompatibility from 1.5.3 to 1.7.0
  * [[FLINK-11094](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11094>)] - Restored state in RocksDBStateBackend that has not been accessed in restored execution causes NPE on snapshot
  * [[FLINK-11123](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11123>)] - Missing import in ML quickstart docs
  * [[FLINK-11136](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11136>)] - Fix the logical of merge for DISTINCT aggregates

##  Improvement

  * [[FLINK-11080](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-11080>)] - Define flink-connector-elasticsearch6 uber-jar dependencies via artifactSet
